headline: 27.6% of customers bought exactly once and never returned.
UK customers retain at 47% over 90 days, but Spain retains at only 35% (75% of the UK rate).
Customers acquired in Nov/Dec retain at 37% — 9 percentage points below the 46% average for the rest of the year.
detail: Consistent with a gift-buying pattern: Christmas customers don't become regulars.

headline: Customers who returned spent £485 on their first order; churned customers spent £355.
